name: ToolNeuron
description: On-device AI for Android — LLM chat (GGUF/llama.cpp), vision models (VLM), image generation (Stable Diffusion), tool calling, AI personas, RAG knowledge packs, TTS/STT. Fully offline, zero subscriptions, open-source.
summaryZh: On-device AI for Android — LLM chat (GGUF/llama.cpp), vision models (VLM), image generation (Stable Diffusion), tool calling, AI personas, RAG knowledge packs, TTS/STT. Fully offline, zero subscriptions, open-source. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。
